findings.description: RST cross-reference directives (`:ref:`send_sync_request_write_test_data`` and `:ref:`about_fixed_length_file``) are left verbatim in the Markdown knowledge file content. These RST-specific directives are unresolvable in a knowledge file context and reduce AI readability. They should either be omitted (as navigation-only references) or replaced with plain-text descriptions.
findings.source_evidence: Source uses RST `:ref:` directives: `\ :ref:`send_sync_request_write_test_data`\` and `\ :ref:`about_fixed_length_file`\` — these are RST link directives that have no meaning outside RST rendering.
